channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Asia shares are mixed following Wall Street's losses, as oil edges lower
item.description: Asia shares are mixed following a mild retreat on Wall Street, while the price of oil fell more than $1 after reaching the highest level since the sum...

item.title: 911 calls, interviews reveal problems at ICE's largest detention camp
item.description: Serious medical and mental health emergencies have been routine at the nation’s largest U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement detention facility si...

item.title: Attempted suicides, fights, pain: 911 calls reveal misery at ICE’s largest detention facility
item.description: The calls to 911 poured in from staff at Camp East Montana, the nation's largest U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement detention facility, in its f...

item.title: Celebration of life for Jesse Jackson to draw former presidents and Grammy-winning artists
item.description: Three former U.S. presidents, Grammy-winning artists, clergy and elected officials are expected to attend a Chicago celebration of life Friday for the...

item.title: GOP Rep. Tony Gonzales of Texas ends reelection bid after admitting to affair with aide
item.description: Republican Rep. Tony Gonzales of Texas is withdrawing from his reelection race, after having admitted an affair with a former staff member who later d...
